title: Trailers Particle
description: Replacing smoke particles with similar ones from the trailer.
body: While I was watching all the Minecraft trailers again to make my modpack, I noticed one detail that for some reason no one had done in Trailers Vision or Bare Bones. These are smoke particles from fire, torches, candles, and mobs disappearing. So I found the textures for these particles in the game and simply replaced them with 4 pixels.
